analyst_observations: Eval 1 (CLI conversion) shows minimal skill benefit — the codebase is well-structured enough that exploration finds the right approach quickly. Non-discriminating test.

Eval 2 (direct API) shows clear skill benefit: with_skill reaches Method 3 immediately (7 tool calls, 59s) vs without_skill exploring 4 options (24 tool calls, 101s). The skill's '方法3' section directly matches user intent.

Eval 3 (knowledge graph) is the strongest discriminator: with_skill scores 75% vs without_skill 50%. Without-skill agent missed the emit_graph_queue.py pdf-extraction mapper entirely. However, with_skill also has a gap: CLI doesn't wire KnowledgeExtractor, which the skill doesn't document.
Critical improvement needed: document the CLI limitation for knowledge extraction and provide the Python API workaround prominently.
The skill saves 57% tool calls on average — significant efficiency gain for complex tasks.
